examples: The gestation period of a horse is about eleven months.
The gestation period can be anything between 95 and 150 days.
Extraembryonic mesoderm migrates through primitive streak to the presumptive yolk sac between days 6.5 and 7.0 of gestation.
"This extended gestation period of the Thompson campaign is getting a little old, " Jeffe says.
Despite its long gestation, Sir Michael's report will probably give birth to a mouse.
